title: Version 5.2 — Explainability Plane
summary: **Patch ladder:** Codenames `Void` → `Bloom` per minor (`.0`–`.9`) — see patch table below.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stageNode["5.2.0 Explainability Plane — confidence + utility AI"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    releaseGate["Release gate"]

    stageNode --> contract
    stageNode --> service
    stageNode --> surface
    stageNode --> data
    stageNode --> ops
    contract --> releaseGate
    service --> releaseGate
    surface --> releaseGate
    data --> releaseGate
    ops --> releaseGate

flowchart LR
    ui["Dashboard UI"]
    gql["GraphQL mutations"]
    ai["contact.ai /api/v1/ai/*"]
    conn["Connectra VQL from parse-filters"]

    ui --> gql
    gql --> ai
    ai -->|"parse-filters"| conn
micro_gate: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter, `.1-.2` scaffold, `.3-.5` hardening, `.6-.8` integration, `.9` freeze/handoff.
